violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. A tube of raw ground beef was stored directly on wrapped raw ribeyes in the reach in cooler in the kitchen.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Consumer self-service sign was not posted where needed or as required. The salad bar did not have a posted sign instructing the consumer to obtain a clean plate.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Containers of potato salad, pea salad, and cucumber salad that were placed in cottage cheese containers in the kitchen reach in cooler were not dated.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. White shelves by the black stove in the kitchen have bare wood on the edges. This is not a cleanable surface. Need to sealed.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. An air conditioner was placed in front of the kitchen hand sink. This blocked easy access to the hand sink.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. The paper towel dispenser for the kitchen hand sink was empty. Disposable towels must be available.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The walls and ceiling in the walk in cooler need to be cleaned.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. The back screen door was propped open.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)

Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
